title: Gooey Algerian Date Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with sweet dates, inspired by Algerian cuisine. Perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a bowl, whisk together the flour, milk, and honey until smooth.
Add the pitted dates and mix until well combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Note: If using gluten-free flour, adjust the cooking time as needed.
